text: Look at you. Are you so pretty? Who's that? Is that Mary Clare? Can you say Mary Clare? You're making silly faces at yourself? Say ah. Look at your bow, how pretty. You want another one? Who's that? Is that Mary Claire? Who's that? Say you? Yeah, bow, pretty. Pretty. Oh. You see yourself? Yeah. Pretty. Pretty. Can you say, hey, look at me. Say pretty. Pretty. Pretty. Pretty. Nope.
